messages.content: Several risk write-ups may describe the same underlying risk. Pick the best exemplar (sharpest mechanism, best evidence) and fold any UNIQUE early-warning indicators from the others into it. If they are genuinely different risks, keep the strongest as exemplar anyway only when they truly overlap — otherwise return the highest-scored id with no folded indicators and note they are distinct.

content: {"keepId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.serviceable-factor-conflation","rationale":"Five of the six write-ups (all except the Eichrecht/metrology one) attack the same underlying risk: the 0.55 serviceableFactor overstates Year-1 reachable demand because it conflates aspirational segments with compliance-cleared, channel-built, integration-neutral demand. The conflation exemplar is the sharpest: it names the definitional failure ('segments we'd like' vs 'tenders we can prequalify for'), cites the strongest quantified analogues (~12% SAM), and enumerates the fullest omitted regulatory stack. The regulatory-stack-undercounted (risk.base-rate-analogy), execution-window flow-not-stock, and per-country-access-stack risks are the same core claim (Year-1 reach below the 0.45 floor) argued via different lenses (2024 stack vintage, flow-vs-stock ramp, serialization clock), and fold in cleanly. The Legrand DCIM-lock risk is a distinct competitive-foreclosure mechanism (integration lock, not regulatory reach) but overlaps in conclusion; its indicators are genuinely additive and worth folding. The Eichrecht/legal-metrology risk (risk.regulatory-gauntlet.eichrecht-metering-foreclosure) is arguably a distinct legal family but still terminates on the same serviceable-reach haircut, so I fold its unique billing-metrology indicators too.","foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"Component-level efficiency and sustainability documentation appearing as mandatory annexes in CE colo/enterprise RFQs","where":"DE/NL data-centre fit-out RFQs and operator supplier-qualification questionnaires","threshold":"≥2 RFQs in the first two quarters listing EED-KPI or 2024/1364-aligned documentation as a mandatory annex","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"National enforcement cadence of EED transposition on data-centre operators","where":"German EnEfG data-centre reporting portal and BMWK implementation guidance releases","threshold":"First enforcement/reporting deadline enforced on operators ≤ Year-1 window","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Count and geographic coverage of signed CE distribution agreements at launch","where":"Vendor's own channel announcements cross-checked against Rexel/Sonepar and regional CE distributor line cards","threshold":"<2 countries covered by signed agreements at launch","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Swiss conformity path status for the product (non-EU, post-MRA friction for networked electrical equipment)","where":"Swiss authorized-representative and conformity guidance (SECO / Swissmem publications) plus vendor compliance roadmap","threshold":"No Swiss authorized rep appointed by launch","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"stiftung EAR WEEE registration processing times and backlog","where":"stiftung EAR portal and published registration statistics","threshold":"processing exceeding 3 months for new B2B registrants","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Integration requirements in CE retrofit/replacement RFQs (incumbent-compatible APIs or named DCIM suites specified as mandatory)","where":"CE colocation and enterprise retrofit tender documents; DCIM vendor compatibility matrices","threshold":"≥50% of retrofit RFQs specify compatibility with an incumbent's management ecosystem as a hard requirement","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Legrand commentary on Raritan + Server Technology portfolio consolidation and installed-base renewal rates","where":"Legrand capital-markets day and quarterly earnings calls, data-center division commentary","threshold":"Explicit claims of installed-base renewal advantage or unified intelligent-PDU platform strategy","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"'Eichrechtskonform'/MID-certified metering requirements appearing in DE colo fit-out RFQs","where":"TED notices; Frankfurt/Berlin colocation fit-out RFQs and operator technical specifications","threshold":"metering-certification clauses in ≥2 DE colo tenders","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Incumbent PDU vendors marketing legally-certified (MID/Eichrecht) metering options","where":"Bachmann, Rittal, Legrand/Raritan German price lists and datasheets","threshold":"≥2 major vendors adding MID/Eichrecht-certified metering SKUs","updates":"increases"}]}
